pages.text: $(o)"All the streams come from one source — they only forgot, after the split."$()$(br2)Foundational scroll of the Leyline School. Short and exact: re-aligns five neighboring chunks back to one tune.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: $(l)Current chunk$() mana $(l)+500$().$(br2)Four orthogonally-adjacent chunks each $(l)+200$().$(br2)Cost: $(l)750$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Pure leyline refill — net $(l)1300/750$() ratio, effectively a money-printing scroll.$(br2)Excellent recurring use at high-cast bases.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or above.
